calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Off Calendar

Application For Judgement
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause comes on calendar today for Application For Judgment today in Dept 514. Judge: Donald J. Sullivan. Clerk: S. Vantree. Reporter: Sandy Carranza, 7062.

Gabriel M.B. Ross, Esq. and Nathaniel H. Kane, Esq appear on behalf of the plaintiffs. No appearance by defendant(s).

After hearing testimony and receiving evidence, the court GRANTS plaintiffs request for Application For Judgment.

Order submitted and signed by the court.

****Attorney Nathaniel H. Kane appeared today to pick up copy of judgment that was signed by the court on July 9, 2012 and stipulated to the return of the evidence binder that was submitted into evidence on June 28, 2012****.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
